Pokémon Card Scanner

Scan a Pokémon card. See the price instantly.

Point your phone at any English Pokémon card. TCG Companion identifies it, shows the current market price and every tracked graded tier, and links you straight to live eBay listings.

Download on the App Store See the sets we cover
  • 27k+cards in the index
  • 178English sets
  • 8graded tiers

What the scanner does

Identify the card, show its current value, and link to real listings. No nonsense.

Camera identification

Point your phone at a card and TCG Companion identifies the exact card, set, number, variant and artist.

Market price on the spot

Once the scan lands, you see the current ungraded market price and every tracked graded tier.

Graded tiers

PSA 10, 9.5, 9, 8, 7, plus BGS 10, CGC 10 and SGC 10 appear for every scanned card.

Live eBay listings

One tap takes you to live eBay listings for the card — filter by sold, graded, or specific grade inside the app.

Add to collection

Save scanned cards to your collection and TCG Companion tracks the total value automatically.

Variants & quantities

Every scan lets you pick the variant (standard, reverse holo, holo, 1st edition, promo) and log multiple copies — so duplicates and variants stay separate in your collection.

Japanese cards

Japanese Pokémon cards are supported in-app with their own price lookups.

What happens after you scan

  1. 01

    Capture the card

    Hold your phone over the card. The scanner frames it and captures it in focus.

  2. 02

    Instant identification

    TCG Companion identifies the card, set, number and variant.

  3. 03

    Value + listings

    The current market price, graded tiers and a live eBay link appear in the same view.

  4. 04

    Save or move on

    Tap "add to collection" to log the card and its value — or skip and scan the next.

Frequently asked questions

Does the scanner work in low light?

Good lighting gives the most reliable results. The app outlines the card and prompts you to adjust if the angle or lighting is off.

Can it scan sleeved or top-loaded cards?

Yes — most sleeves and toploaders don't interfere. Very reflective sleeves may need a small tilt to reduce glare.

Is there an Android version?

TCG Companion is currently iOS-only. Meanwhile you can browse set lists and cards on this website.

Does it scan Japanese cards?

Yes. Japanese Pokémon cards are supported inside the app.

Start scanning your collection

Download TCG Companion and turn a shoebox of cards into a priced-up digital collection.

Download on the App Store
